package_name: Paris Ultimate Experience Package for American Travelers
verification_summary: Criteria verified: 1) Hotel: search_hotels('Paris 4 star hotel pool wifi') found 4-star hotel with pool and wifi. 2) Airbnb: search_attractions('Airbnb experience Paris rating 4.5') found experience with rating >= 4.5. 3) Attraction: search_attractions('Paris attraction entry fee under $30') found attraction with fee < $30. 4) Historical travelers: search_travel_recommendations('American Paris Hotel') found 3+ American travelers who stayed in hotels.
